examples.title: Safety Property Checker
examples.description: Python code to verify safety property in a blockchain
examples.explanation: This checker detects safety violations by tracking committed blocks at each height. If two different blocks are committed at the same height, safety is violated.

examples.title: Blockchain Trilemma Analyzer
examples.description: JavaScript tool to analyze blockchain trade-offs
examples.explanation: This analyzer helps understand trilemma trade-offs. Bitcoin sacrifices scalability for decentralization and security. Solana sacrifices decentralization for scalability.

examples.title: Sybil Resistance Demonstration
examples.description: Go code showing how PoS prevents Sybil attacks
examples.explanation: PoS prevents Sybil attacks because voting power is proportional to stake, not identity count. An attacker with 10000 tokens has the same power whether using 1 or 100 identities.
